display_text: Bane Aghanim's Scepter: Creates two uncontrollable illusions that channel Fiend's Grip alongside Bane. This upgrade counters single-target disables by making it harder to interrupt all Fiend's Grip channels simultaneously, significantly increasing teamfight control and damage.
search_text: Bane Aghanim Scepter counter-disable anti-interrupt Fiend's Grip illusions teamfight control

display_text: Bane Aghanim's Shard: Turns Brain Sap into an AoE spell, healing Bane and damaging enemies in a 550 radius. This upgrade counters AoE damage spells by ensuring Bane sustains health even in chaotic teamfights, transforming him into a durable teamfight presence.
search_text: Bane Aghanim Shard AoE Brain Sap healing anti-burst teamfight sustain
